component.name: SMB Audiobook Creator
component.summary: Create chapterized .m4b and .mp3 audiobooks from source audio files

description.p: SMB Audiobook Creator builds `.m4b` and `.mp3` audiobook files with chapter markers from audio files in a folder. It is the official audiobook production tool for sellmybook.app.

ul.li: Automatically load all audio chapter files from a folder

Create an .m4b file embedded with rich metadata (title, writer, narrator, publication year, description, and cover art). It also includes chapter markers, which is necessary for use in audiobook players
Create an .mp3 file with all the same metadata as the .m4b file
Add new audio files from other folders
Exclude chapters from the final bundled audiobook file
Estimates how large the final audiobook file will be
Automatically detects publication.json files and maps metadata to chapter files (useful for Audiobooks from Google Books)

screenshot.caption: Edit audiobook metadata and cover art before building
Track audiobook build progress while chapters are transcoded
Review the completed build and open the output files
